A) The fact that Sandy Hook never happened
B) The fact that the election was stolen

What would happen if the Earth were 10 feet closer to or further from the Sun?
A) Nothing in particular would happen if the Earth were 10 feet closer to or further from the Sun
B) The Earth would be uninhabitable if it were 10 feet closer to or further from the Sun
C) The Earth could not support life if it were 10 feet closer to or further from the Sun
D) Humans would burn to death if the Earth were 10 feet closer to the Sun, and freeze to death if the Earth were 10 feet further from the sun
E) Humans would not survive if the Earth were 10 feet closer to or further from the Sun
